# slides

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Slides lens: each top-level block is a slide; top-level dividers split slides.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Story.Renderer` "Slides" → `SlidesRenderer`
  - Uses: `apps/story/render.Story`, `primitives/card.Card`, `primitives/icon-button.IconButton`, `primitives/spacing.Stack`, `primitives/text.Text`
